message.entry: Unexpected constant found at parse time "{0}"\n
Can''t get function ''{0}''.
Can''t load m_lxe library ''{0}''.
The feature is not supported any more and will be obsoleted in a future release.
*** feature {0} options are \n*** ''{1}''
Out of memory. The likely cause is an infinite recursion within the program.
Error: File: {0} Line: {1,number,integer}\nA BREAK may only be used within a FOR or WHILE loop, and then only within the same file as its corresponding FOR or WHILE statement.
Error: File: {0} Line: {1,number,integer}\nA CONTINUE may only be used within a FOR or WHILE loop, and then only within the same file as its corresponding FOR or WHILE statement.
Cached ir for file ''{0}'' is version {1}. This version of MATLAB uses version {2}. The cached IR is being ignored.
The P-code file {0} was generated prior to MATLAB version 7.5 (R2007b) and is no longer supported. Use pcode to regenerate the file using MATLAB R2007b or later.
Conversion to {0} from {1} is not possible.
Input arguments to function include colon operator. To input the colon character, use ':' instead.
Inputs to the built-in function END must be scalar numeric.
Incorrect number of arguments to built-in function END.
In call end(obj,k,n), k must be less than or equal to n.
The input file name must be specified.
"File, {0} not found."
The input file must be a ".m" file.
Error: Attempt to modify read-only workspace.
Error: Operation not supported for the provided file {0}.
Error: Either the types and/or values of the arguments for the source position are bad.
{0}Assignment to {1} not supported. Variable has the same name as a local function.
Error: File: {1} Line: {0,number,integer}\nThe end operator must be used within an array index expression.
The end operator must be used within an array index expression.
Error: File: {0} Line: {1,number,integer}\nAssignment to {2} not supported. Variable has the same name as a local function.
Breakpoint must be in a named function and on a line that contains an anonymous function.
Setting or clearing breakpoints in out of sync P-files is not supported.
MATLAB could not restore all breakpoints because file ''{0}'' was modified outside of the MATLAB editor.
The variable {0} must be declared as a global variable before any use.
{0}Identifier ''{1}'' in the evaluated statement does not refer to the nested function. In a future release, using an identifier different to how it is used in the file will not be supported.
{0}Identifier ''{1}'' in the evaluated statement does not refer to the local function. In a future release, using an identifier different to how it is used in the file will not be supported.
{0}Local function ''{1}'' in the evaluated statement is shadowed by a workspace variable. In a future release, the local function would be given preference.
{0}Identifier ''{1}'' in the evaluated statement does not refer to the external function. In a future release, using an identifier different to how it is used in the file will not be supported.
{0}Function ''{1}'' in the evaluated statement is shadowed by a workspace variable. In a future release, the function would be given preference.
{0}Identifier ''{1}'' in the evaluated statement does not refer to the variable. In a future release, using an identifier different to how it is used in the file will not be supported.
Error: {0}Declaring a variable with the same name as the local function "{1}" is not supported in scripts.
Error: {0}Declaring a variable with the same name as the imported function "{1}" is not supported.
Error: {0}Importing a class or a function with the same name as that of a nested function "{1}" is not supported.
Error: {0}Importing a class or a function with the same name as that of a local function "{1}" is not supported.
Error: {0}Invalid syntax for calling function ''{1}'' on the path. Use a valid syntax or explicitly initialize ''{1}'' to make it a variable.
Unable to use curly braces to index into {0}.
Error: {0}Indexing into the output of a function call is not supported.
Error: {0}Using ans as the name of a function or a class in a package is not supported.
Sharing Variables Between Parent and Nested Functions
Error:{0}Identifier ''{1}'' is not a function or a shared variable. To share ''{1}'' with a nested function, initialize it in the current scope. For more information, see {2}.
Error: {0}Invalid digit in hexadecimal literal. Supported hexadecimal digits are 0-9 and A-F. Supported type suffixes are u8, u16, u32, u64, and s8, s16, s32, s64.
Error: {0}Hexadecimal literal has too many digits for specified or implied type suffix.
Error: {0}Invalid digit in binary literal. Supported binary digits are 0 and 1. Supported type suffixes are u8, u16, u32, u64, and s8, s16, s32, s64.
Error: {0}Binary literal has too many digits for specified or implied type suffix.
MATLAB encountered an internal error processing {0}. Keep a copy of this file and contact Technical Support with the following information.\n{1}
‘move’ can only be called using a variable from within a function.
Error: {0}Unsupported use of the '=' operator. To compare values for equality, use '=='. To pass name-value arguments using the name=value format, provide these arguments after all other inputs.
Error: {0}Unsupported use of the '=' operator. To compare values for equality, use '=='.
Error: {0}Invalid text character. The text ''{1}'' contains an unsupported non-ASCII whitespace character.
Error: {0}Unsupported use of the '=' operator. To compare values for equality, use '=='. To specify name-value arguments, check that name is a valid identifier with no surrounding quotes.
